scripts.dev: bun run build:sqlite-extension && bun run src/server/dev.ts
scripts.reset-db: bun run build:sqlite-extension && bun run src/server/reset-db.ts
scripts.build: bun run build:sqlite-extension && bun run src/server/build-web.ts && bun build --compile --compile-autoload-tsconfig --compile-autoload-package-json src/server/web-binary-entry.ts --outfile dist/staden
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.client.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.server.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.root.json --noEmit
scripts.verify: bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run build && bun run test:unit
scripts.test-coverage: bun run build:sqlite-extension && bun test src --coverage --max-concurrency=1
scripts.test:unit: bun run build:sqlite-extension && bun test src
scripts.test: bun run test:unit && bun run test:e2e
